name: Name
usernameHint: 3-32 characters, letters, numbers, underscore. Used in profile URL.
passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
forgotPasswordHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists for this email, we've sent a link to reset your password. The link is valid for 1 hour.
forgotPasswordError: Failed to send email. Try again later.
resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.
resetPasswordError: Invalid or expired link. Request a new reset link.
resetPasswordNoToken: Missing reset link. Open the link from your email or request a new one.
